Uses of Package
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity

Description
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity
 
com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.mapper

  • Classes in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity used by com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity
    Class
    Description
    AnnotationEntity
    Represents a user-created annotation attached to a media item.
    CollectionEntity
    Represents a user-defined collection of media items.
    CollectionItemEntity
    Join entity linking collections and items.
    CollectionItemId
    Composite primary key for the collection_items table.
    ItemEntity
    Represents a media item retrieved from a NASA data source.
    NasaSourceApi
    Identifies the NASA API that provided a media item.
    RoleEntity
    Defines a security role used for authorization.
    RoleType
    Supported application roles used for authorization.
    UserEntity
    Represents an application user.
    UserRoleEntity
    Join entity connecting users and roles.
    UserRoleId
    Composite primary key for the user_roles table.
